content_body: The longest swinging bridge east of the Mississippi River, the 265-foot-long Swinging Bridge on the Toccoa River is one of the most scenic river locations in North Georgia. Not surprisingly, that also makes it a very popular desination for day-hikers in Blue Ridge. Located on the Benton MacKaye Trail, The Swinging Bridge is a great spot for hiking, enjoying the scenery, picnics, and swimming. Walking along the bridge is sure to delight, as your steps will make the bridge sway from side to side! Whether you're looking for a family-friendly activity or a fun day trip with friends, gather up your loved ones and check it out during your next stay in Blue Ridge!
title: Area Spotlight: The Swinging Bridge
